title: 11 Herbal Teas Proven to Help Older Adults with Nasal Congestion
description: Lavandula angustifolia teas have been traditionally used to help alleviate nasal congestion. The tea's effectiveness can be attributed to its high content of linalool and linalyl acetate, two compounds that have natural anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties. These properties help to reduce swelling in the nasal passages, making it easier to breathe.
